---
title: "Activity 07: K-means analysis"
author: "Navarroza"
date: "June 8"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
# 1
morph_data <- read.csv("morphology_data.csv")

morph_clean <- morph_data[, !(names(morph_data) %in% c("Pop", "Sex"))]
morph_scaled <- scale(morph_clean)

# 2 
set.seed(123)
km_3 <- kmeans(morph_scaled, centers = 3, nstart = 25)
print(km_3)

# 3
plot(morph_clean$SVL, morph_clean$TD, 
     col = km_3$cluster, pch = 19, 
     main = "K-means Clustering (K=3)", 
     xlab = "SVL", ylab = "TD")

# 4
wss <- numeric(9)
for (k in 2:10) {
  km_loop <- kmeans(morph_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)
  wss[k-1] <- km_loop$tot.withinss
}
plot(2:10, wss, type = "b", pch = 19, 
     xlab = "Number of clusters (K)", ylab = "WSS")
```
